name: tradeops
description: TradeOps — The AI Operating System for Global Commerce

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter @tradeops/config --filter @tradeops/logging --filter @tradeops/contracts --filter @tradeops/domain --filter @tradeops/auth --filter @tradeops/commerce-engine --filter @tradeops/connector-core --filter @tradeops/connector-fixture-supplier --filter @tradeops/connector-fixture-marketplace --filter @tradeops/connector-google-merchant --filter @tradeops/harmonization --filter @tradeops/ai-runtime --filter @tradeops/workflow-engine --filter @tradeops/database run build && pnpm -r --filter @tradeops/api --filter @tradeops/worker --filter @tradeops/web run build
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:generate && pnpm build
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
